_comment: MCP server configurations for Claude Code. These will be written to .mcp.json (project-scope) when selected. See: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp
_note: MCP servers CANNOT be configured in settings.json/settings.local.json - they must be in .mcp.json (project), ~/.claude.json (user), or managed-mcp.json (system)

server_name._description: For our internal use - not part of Claude Code schema
server_name.name: Display name for selection UI
server_name.config: Actual MCP server config (gets written to .mcp.json)
server_name.required_permissions: Not used - MCP server permissions are managed separately by Claude Code

obsidian.name: Obsidian MCP
obsidian.description: Connect to Obsidian vault (update path after generation)
obsidian.note: After generation, update the path in settings.local.json to your actual Obsidian MCP server path

chrome_devtools.name: Chrome DevTools MCP
chrome_devtools.description: Control Chrome browser via DevTools protocol
